mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_data_change_detail ( log_id, field_name, field_label, old_value, new_value, value_type, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.logId}, #{item.fieldName}, #{item.fieldLabel}, #{item.oldValue}, #{item.newValue}, #{item.valueType}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_data_change_detail WHERE log_id = #{logId} ORDER BY id
